# vendor:device  PMD   -- generated from DPDK 22.11 id tables by tools/gen-pmd-ids.sh
# Lets vfio-setup.sh / bypass.sh identify a card's PMD WITHOUT the DPDK source tree,
# so the pre-built binaries can just be copied to the Intel machines.
